title: From "Bust" to MLB Superstar: Jordan Walker Is Finally the Player We All Hoped For
description: The Cardinals' 24-year-old is putting up All-Star numbers in 2026 — a .292/.346/.545 slash line and a 3.4 WAR in just 71 games. What changed this offseason that turned a labeled bust into St. Louis's offensive catalyst?

title: Yankees Baseball Operations Portfolio
description: A comprehensive baseball operations analysis of the 2026 New York Yankees — optimal lineup construction with sabermetric reasoning, full payroll and CBT breakdown, arbitration primer, current depth chart, and a complete 2026–27 offseason strategic plan. Written from the perspective of a baseball operations analyst.

title: Cubs Optimal Lineup, Sabermetrics Not Salary
description: OBP-first sabermetric lineup optimization for the 2026 Chicago Cubs. Generates two lineups — vs RHP and vs LHP — using platoon-adjusted OBP scoring and the Hungarian algorithm. Built from FanGraphs and Baseball Reference data. Includes interactive charts, per-player profiles, and full methodology.

title: Rebuilding the 2026 Chicago White Sox
description: A WAR-based valuation model for rebuilding the 2026 Chicago White Sox. Combines $/WAR surplus valuation, a Gaussian revenue-maximization curve, playing-time reallocation, and a wOBA-weighted optimal lineup using The Book's leverage heuristic.
